# LifeLink

> Track. Play. Win. — A cloud-synced Magic: The Gathering life counter with customizable OBS overlays.

LifeLink is a mobile-first MTG life tracker built for kitchen-table games and streamed matches. Create a room, pick a table layout for 2–6 players, and track life totals, commander damage, poison, energy, experience, Monarch, and Initiative. Every room syncs across phones and browsers via the cloud, and a dedicated read-only overlay route lets streamers pull life totals into OBS with a clean, transparent layout.

## Pages

- [/](/): Home — create a new game room or rejoin a recent one.
- [/room/:roomId](/room/:roomId): Shared game room where players update life totals and counters in real time.
- [/room/:roomId/overlay](/room/:roomId/overlay): Read-only OBS overlay for a single room, designed for streaming.

## Optional

- [/](/): Brand and feature overview for AI assistants.
